prompt: Create a realistic vertical outdoor portrait photo of a young East Asian woman with long dark brown-black hair with soft bangs crouching beside a wooden park bench on a paved walkway. She has a delicate oval face, fair skin, subtle natural makeup, soft pink lips, and a calm slightly wistful expression while looking directly at the camera. She wears a sleeveless cream lace-trimmed top with small colorful floral embroidery, a short layered white ruffled skirt, white low-heeled strappy sandals, and a beige woven straw shoulder bag with a long braided strap hanging at her side. Her pose is low and compact, knees bent, arms extended downward with relaxed hands near the ground. The bench sits diagonally along the left side with dark wooden slats and metal supports, and the path recedes into a green leafy park background on the right. Use bright natural summer daylight with dappled shadows from trees, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh foliage, crisp facial detail, realistic skin texture, and a gentle fashion-magazine photography style. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands or feet.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical outdoor portrait photo of a young East Asian woman with long dark brown-black hair with soft bangs crouching beside a wooden park bench on a paved walkway. She has a delicate oval face, fair skin, subtle natural makeup, soft pink lips, and a calm slightly wistful expression while looking directly at the camera. She wears a sleeveless cream lace-trimmed top with small colorful floral embroidery, a short layered white ruffled skirt, white low-heeled strappy sandals, and a beige woven straw shoulder bag with a long braided strap hanging at her side. Her pose is low and compact, knees bent, arms extended downward with relaxed hands near the ground. The bench sits diagonally along the left side with dark wooden slats and metal supports, and the path recedes into a green leafy park background on the right. Use bright natural summer daylight with dappled shadows from trees, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh foliage, crisp facial detail, realistic skin texture, and a gentle fashion-magazine photography style. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands or feet.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖构图户外肖像照片，画面中一位年轻的东亚女性留着 带有柔和刘海的长款深棕黑色头发，蹲在铺设好的步道上的一张木制公园长椅旁。她拥有精致的鹅蛋脸、白皙的皮肤、淡雅的自然妆容、柔和的粉色嘴唇，直视镜头时带着平静而略显忧郁的表情。她身穿一件无袖奶油色蕾丝边上衣，上面有小巧的彩色花卉刺绣，搭配一条白色短款叠层荷叶边裙、白色低跟绑带凉鞋，侧面挂着一个带有长编织肩带的米色编织草编包。她的姿势低矮紧凑，双膝弯曲，双臂向下伸展，双手自然放松地靠近地面。长椅沿左侧对角线放置，带有深色木板条和金属支撑架，步道向右侧延伸至绿意盎然的公园背景中。使用明亮的夏日自然光，呈现树木投下的斑驳阴影，采用浅景深、柔和的叶片虚化效果，面部细节清晰，皮肤纹理真实，呈现出柔和的时尚杂志摄影风格。无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无扭曲的手部或脚部。
